mainEntity.name: Does voice assistant optimization need to be different for Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you serve customers in Los Angeles, San Diego, Austin, Denver, or Salt Lake City, local optimization matters more because assistants often prioritize nearby results. That means consistent business details, local pages, and location-specific FAQs can influence whether you appear for near me queries.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes. Local markets depend more on nearby intent, business listings, and city-specific pages. Consistent location data and local FAQs help assistants match you to nearby searches.
